_description: Single source of truth for E2E patient assignments. The two parametrized E2E test files (acceptance, rejection) and the super-user runner all read from `patients` below. Adding a new patient = one entry here + one builder in tests/e2e/_manifest.py — never a new test file. Do NOT hardcode pid = 'PX' inside test files.

P1.scenario: Full acceptance — all 7 tests, all stages (FD→Phlebo→Acc→LT→Doctor)

P2.scenario: 3-cycle rejection — Acc:Serum → LT:24h urine → Dr:LFT resample → partial_approve

P3.scenario: Partial pipeline — phlebo 3/4, acc 2/3, LT 1/2 (Serum), Dr approves RFT+LFT

P5.scenario: Existing relative Sunita Kumari Mishra (Wife, 8839900148) — full acceptance, all 7 tests

P6.scenario: 3-cycle rejection — Acc:Urine → LT:Serum → Dr:CBC resample → full approve

P7.scenario: Add-relative limit error — 10-patient cap reached on 8839900148 (FD-only error test)

P8.scenario: New user Priya Sharma (8900000010) — full acceptance, all 7 tests

P9.scenario: New user Rohan Desai (8900000011) — 3-cycle rejection → LFT resample → full approve

P10.scenario: New user Kavita Nair (8900000012) — Acc:24h urine, full LT, Dr approve all + rectify LFT

P11.scenario: Duplicate-mobile error — new patient form with 9999999999 (already registered) (FD-only error test)

P12.scenario: New relative Vikram Kumar Mishra (Brother, 7777777777) — full acceptance flow

P13.scenario: Partial rejection — Acc:Serum, LT:24h urine, Dr approves all (no doctor resample). Local date 16/04/2026.

P14.scenario: New user Sanjay Mehta (8900000013) — 3 tests (CBC+RFT+LFT), partial LT params, Dr partial_approve

_usage_note: When adding a new E2E patient: (1) add an entry to `patients` above with primary_file + markers + scenario, (2) add the patient to `_patient_map` (mobile, name), (3) add a `_build_p<N>` function in tests/e2e/_manifest.py and register it in PATIENT_MANIFESTS, (4) register the phase order in utils/reporting/constants.py::_PATIENT_PHASE_ORDERS. No new test file is needed. P1–P4 are different visits for Aditya Kumar Mishra (primary). P5 is a relative on account 8839900148. P6 is Aditya with 3-cycle rejection. P7 tests the 10-patient limit error. P8–P10 are new users. P13 is Aditya with local date 16/04/2026.
